languages.text: "Инквизитор Диодас посмел обвинить меня, Вольного Торговца, в ереси! Он решил, что влияние Инквизиции настолько велико, что он может игнорировать привилегии, дарованные Патентом и напасть на меня в собственном дворце. Диодас считает себя выше самого Бога-Императора? Что ж, за это он поплатится".

"Inquisitor af Irramon dared to accuse me, a Rogue Trader, of heresy! He reckons that the influence of the Inquisition is so great that he can disregard the privileges granted by the Warrant and attack me in my own palace. Diodas thinks he's above the God-Emperor Himself? Well, he will pay for his hubris."
languages.original_text: "Инквизитор Диодас посмел обвинить меня, Вольного Торговца, в ереси! Он решил, что влияние Инквизиции настолько велико, что он может игнорировать привилегии, дарованные Патентом и напасть на меня в собственном дворце. Диодас считает себя выше самого Бога-Императора? Что ж, за это он поплатится".

languages.text: “审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙胆敢指控我——一位行商浪人——是异端！他自恃审判庭权势滔天，竟敢无视贸易授状赋予我的特权，跑到我的宫殿里来攻打我。狄奥达斯真觉得自己可以凌驾于神皇之上了？哼，他定会为自己的傲慢付出代价。”
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon dared to accuse me, a Rogue Trader, of heresy! He reckons that the influence of the Inquisition is so great that he can disregard the privileges granted by the Warrant and attack me in my own palace. Diodas thinks he's above the God-Emperor Himself? Well, he will pay for his hubris."

traits.locale_text: “审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙胆敢指控我——一位行商浪人——是异端！他自恃审判庭权势滔天，竟敢无视贸易授状赋予我的特权，跑到我的宫殿里来攻打我。狄奥达斯真觉得自己可以凌驾于神皇之上了？哼，他定会为自己的傲慢付出代价。”

languages.text: « L'inquisiteur af Irramon ose m'accuser d'hérésie, moi, un libre-marchand ! Il s'imagine que l'influence de son ordre est telle qu'il peut allègrement bafouer les privilèges octroyés par la lettre de marque et venir m'attaquer dans mon propre palais ! Diodas se croit au-dessus de l'Empereur-Dieu en personne ? Qu'à cela ne tienne, il va payer cher son arrogance ! »
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon dared to accuse me, a Rogue Trader, of heresy! He reckons that the influence of the Inquisition is so great that he can disregard the privileges granted by the Warrant and attack me in my own palace. Diodas thinks he's above the God-Emperor Himself? Well, he will pay for his hubris."

traits.locale_text: « L'inquisiteur af Irramon ose m'accuser d'hérésie, moi, un libre-marchand ! Il s'imagine que l'influence de son ordre est telle qu'il peut allègrement bafouer les privilèges octroyés par la lettre de marque et venir m'attaquer dans mon propre palais ! Diodas se croit au-dessus de l'Empereur-Dieu en personne ? Qu'à cela ne tienne, il va payer cher son arrogance ! »

languages.text: "Engizisyoncu af İrramon beni, bir Hür Tacir'i kâfirlikle suçlama cüretini gösterdi! Engizisyon'un nüfuzunu öyle büyük görüyor ki Ruhsatname'nin sağladığı ayrıcalıkları hiçe sayıp bana kendi sarayımda saldırıyor. Diodas kendini bizzat Tanrı İmparator'dan üstün mü görüyor? Öyleyse küstahlığı cezasız kalmayacak."
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon dared to accuse me, a Rogue Trader, of heresy! He reckons that the influence of the Inquisition is so great that he can disregard the privileges granted by the Warrant and attack me in my own palace. Diodas thinks he's above the God-Emperor Himself? Well, he will pay for his hubris."

traits.locale_text: "Engizisyoncu af İrramon beni, bir Hür Tacir'i kâfirlikle suçlama cüretini gösterdi! Engizisyon'un nüfuzunu öyle büyük görüyor ki Ruhsatname'nin sağladığı ayrıcalıkları hiçe sayıp bana kendi sarayımda saldırıyor. Diodas kendini bizzat Tanrı İmparator'dan üstün mü görüyor? Öyleyse küstahlığı cezasız kalmayacak."

languages.text: «¡El Inquisidor af Irramon se atreve a acusarme a mí, a un Comerciante Independiente, de herejía! Cree que la influencia de la Inquisición es tan grande como para ignorar los privilegios que me otorga la Patente y atacarme en mi propio palacio. ¿Diodas cree que está por encima del mismísimo Dios Emperador? Pagará por su arrogancia».
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon dared to accuse me, a Rogue Trader, of heresy! He reckons that the influence of the Inquisition is so great that he can disregard the privileges granted by the Warrant and attack me in my own palace. Diodas thinks he's above the God-Emperor Himself? Well, he will pay for his hubris."

traits.locale_text: «¡El Inquisidor af Irramon se atreve a acusarme a mí, a un Comerciante Independiente, de herejía! Cree que la influencia de la Inquisición es tan grande como para ignorar los privilegios que me otorga la Patente y atacarme en mi propio palacio. ¿Diodas cree que está por encima del mismísimo Dios Emperador? Pagará por su arrogancia».

languages.text: "Inquisitor af Irramon hat es gewagt, mich, einen Freihändler, der Ketzerei zu bezichtigen! Er nimmt an, dass der Einfluss der Inquisition so groß ist, dass er die durch den Handelsbrief gewährten Privilegien ignorieren und mich in meinem eigenen Palast angreifen kann. Denkt Diodas, er steht über dem Gottimperator Selbst? Tja, er wird für seinen Hochmut bezahlen."
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon dared to accuse me, a Rogue Trader, of heresy! He reckons that the influence of the Inquisition is so great that he can disregard the privileges granted by the Warrant and attack me in my own palace. Diodas thinks he's above the God-Emperor Himself? Well, he will pay for his hubris."

traits.locale_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon hat es gewagt, mich, einen Freihändler, der Ketzerei zu bezichtigen! Er nimmt an, dass der Einfluss der Inquisition so groß ist, dass er die durch den Handelsbrief gewährten Privilegien ignorieren und mich in meinem eigenen Palast angreifen kann. Denkt Diodas, er steht über dem Gottimperator Selbst? Tja, er wird für seinen Hochmut bezahlen."

languages.text: 「イラモンの検閲官が、私のようなローグトレーダーを異端として非難した！彼は検閲官の権威が大きすぎて、許可証で与えられた特権を無視して、私の宮殿で私を攻撃できると考えている。ディオダスは神皇帝よりも偉いと思っているのか？彼は彼の傲慢さに対して罰を受けるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon dared to accuse me, a Rogue Trader, of heresy! He reckons that the influence of the Inquisition is so great that he can disregard the privileges granted by the Warrant and attack me in my own palace. Diodas thinks he's above the God-Emperor Himself? Well, he will pay for his hubris."

traits.locale_text: 「イラモンの検閲官が、私のようなローグトレーダーを異端として非難した！彼は検閲官の権威が大きすぎて、許可証で与えられた特権を無視して、私の宮殿で私を攻撃できると考えている。ディオダスは神皇帝よりも偉いと思っているのか？彼は彼の傲慢さに対して罰を受けるだろう。」
